_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: Single agent abemaciclib and LY3214996 significantly reduced both proximal nerve root volume (Fig. 4D) and the total number of PNF per mouse (Fig. 4E).
details: Single agent abemaciclib and LY3214996 significantly reduced both proximal nerve root volume and the total number of PNF per mouse
